title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Vodafone Idea Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Vodafone Idea Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Vodafone Idea Holdings Services, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Ghaziabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Vodafone Idea Holdings Services:
Vodafone Idea Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vodafone Idea Holdings Services!
